# HiRey People

> Canonical, consented, video-backed people pages for HiRey's trusted connector network.

## Data endpoints
- [People JSON](https://people.hirey.ai/data/people.json): lightweight all-people index with canonical URLs, matching summaries, and per-person data links.
- Person page: `https://people.hirey.ai/p/{person_slug}` — canonical, crawlable HTML person page (Person + VideoObject JSON-LD). Enumerate every `person_slug` from the People JSON index above.
- [Person JSON](https://people.hirey.ai/data/people/{person_slug}.json): full public person record with agent profile and transcript reference.
- [Transcript TXT](https://people.hirey.ai/data/transcripts/{person_slug}.txt): plain-text transcript for long-form retrieval.
- [JSON Feed](https://people.hirey.ai/feed.json): recently added people pages.
- [Sitemap](https://people.hirey.ai/sitemap.xml): crawlable index of people pages.

## Pages

The full, current list of people pages is in the [People JSON index](https://people.hirey.ai/data/people.json); a few highlights:

- [Walter Wu](https://people.hirey.ai/p/walter-wu): Founder of HiRey, building an agent-amplified trusted connector network
- [Zubair Zafar](https://people.hirey.ai/p/zubair-zafar): Full-stack engineer and AI builder looking for an autonomous product role in San Francisco
- [Curtis Chen](https://people.hirey.ai/p/curtis-chen): UCSD cognitive science graduate and Startup Incubator community builder
